intended_use: BriefCase-Triage is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of CT chest, abdomen, or chest/abdomen exams with contrast (CTA and CT with contras
intended_use_full: BriefCase-Triage is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of CT chest, abdomen, or chest/abdomen exams with contrast (CTA and CT with contrast) in adults or transitional adolescents aged 18 and older. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings of Aortic Dissection (AD) pathology.
ground_truth: Three senior board-certified radiologists serving as ground truth reviewers
other_metrics: Positive Likelihood Ratio (PLR): 12.8 (95% CI: 8.5- 19.2); Negative Likelihood Ratio (NLR): 0.08 (95% CI: 0.05- 0.13); Time-to-notification: 10.7 seconds (95% CI: 10.5-10.9) for subject device vs. 38.0 seconds (95% CI: 35.5-40.4) for predicate device
